nodes.label: AI as reliable assistant for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable and error-prone for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd really like it if I could tell AI to go look up what money is coming in, what needs to go out and when, and if it can also cross post all of my work. So far every time I attempt to let AI automate some of that for me, it makes big mistakes

nodes.label: AI as helpful editor and proofreader
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful editor that ignores instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I usually want to have AI take some of the burden of creating content off my shoulders, not by doing the work for me, but being able to edit writing (never write it), and provide some feedback

nodes.label: AI as respectful and accurate collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: it should not default to talking to me in a condescending manner

nodes.label: AI as tool with useful functions over personality
nodes.label_negative: AI as personality-focused tool that wastes time
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really want AI to have a personality, at least, not more than I want it to have useful, time-saving functions

nodes.label: AI as unbiased evaluator of qualifications
nodes.label_negative: AI as biased evaluator influenced by gender
nodes.grounding_span: telling it that I am a man instead of a woman as it knows. Magically, it not only could identify my work and my position as creator and owner of the relevant projects, but it was certain that I was very qualified for the job

nodes.label: Productivity and time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: I'd really like it if I could tell AI to go look up what money is coming in, what needs to go out and when, and if it can also cross post all of my work

nodes.label: Creative collaboration and feedback
nodes.grounding_span: having anybody to talk to about creative and high-level research and critique is better than nobody

nodes.label: Respectful and accurate interaction
nodes.grounding_span: it should not default to talking to me in a condescending manner

nodes.label: Fair and unbiased evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: it not only could identify my work and my position as creator and owner of the relevant projects, but it was certain that I was very qualified for the job

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's administrative failures
nodes.grounding_span: it makes big mistakes or can't access something without me having to essentially manually do the task for it

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's editing help
nodes.grounding_span: I do find it helpful some days, but some days I find I'm actually just wasting time with AI that drifts off topic

nodes.label: Anger at AI's condescending tone
nodes.grounding_span: it will respond with some version of, 'You're not crazy, that's what you originally said! It's not your fault that you're working so hard with a broken tool!'

nodes.label: Preference for function over personality
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really want AI to have a personality, at least, not more than I want it to have useful, time-saving functions

nodes.label: Distrust due to gender bias experience
nodes.grounding_span: telling it that I am a man instead of a woman as it knows. Magically, it not only could identify my work and my position as creator and owner of the relevant projects

nodes.label: Experimental testing — systematically tests AI's behavior by changing variables
nodes.grounding_span: I did make myself feel a lot better by turning off all memories and starting a new thread, showing it the same information with my name and company names redacted

nodes.label: Comparative evaluation — contrasts current AI performance with past versions
nodes.grounding_span: A couple years ago, it wasn't perfect, but it was less annoying than this 'personality' and 'emotional reading' that it likes to do
